EmailTemplate.description: Automated email to the candidate when assigned the Alliance employment contract
EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract Document Pack
EmailTemplate.subject: Contract Document Pack
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WELCOME TO ALLIANCE RURAL AND REMOTE HEALTH.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are excited to finally welcome you to the Alliance Rural & Remote Health family! Attached is a copy of your employment contract.
You can add your digital signature here:
SIGN CONTRACT
We've also added a copy of the Alliance Rural & Remote Health employee handbook, where you can find all details regarding your new role, information consent and the Fair work statement. Please review these documents and confirm when you've read the document.
Once you've signed the contract and the other documents, we'll send you a link to book yourself in for an Induction. Once you've attended the session, you're ready to get booked in for contracts!
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Your next adventure is just around the corner!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
